---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an editor feature or UI improvement
title: ''
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

**What you'd like**
A clear description of the feature or change to the control surface.

**Why**
The workflow or musical problem it solves.

**Firmware dependency**
Does this need a new control or message in the `spore` firmware (CC / SysEx)? If so, link or
open the matching `spore` issue — the MIDI map is defined there and mirrored in `app.js`.
